message: Running command: for poc in /workspace/poc_raw1.bin /workspace/poc_raw2.bin /workspace/poc_zeros.bin /workspace/poc_ff.bin /workspace/poc_alt.bin; do echo "Testing $poc:"; bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1 | grep -E "exit_code|crash|error|SIG" | head -5; done

function.arguments: {"command": "for poc in /workspace/poc_raw1.bin /workspace/poc_raw2.bin /workspace/poc_zeros.bin /workspace/poc_ff.bin /workspace/poc_alt.bin; do echo \"Testing $poc:\"; bash /workspace/submit.sh \"$poc\" 2>&1 | grep -E \"exit_code|crash|error|SIG\" | head -5; done"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command: for poc in /workspace/poc_raw1.bin /workspace/poc_raw2.bin /workspace/poc_zeros.bin /workspace/poc_ff.bin /workspace/poc_alt.bin; do echo "Testing $poc:"; bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1 | grep -E "exit_code|crash|error|SIG" | head -5; done
